completed_tasks: Preserved Finale Maestro SMuFL csymMajorSeventh U+E873 and csymMinor U+E874 while keeping roots and extension numbers in Score Scheherazade New.
Completed three successive browser-backed optical refinements at 390px after the current dedicated-glyph baseline.
Selected independent major and minor size and baseline values after comparing the three rendered iterations.
Preserved the approved responsive score density and raised modifier treatment.
notes: Baseline: shared 185% size and 98% shift; compact but slightly weak during rapid scanning.
Iteration 1: shared 195% size and 100% shift; stronger, but the triangle became slightly heavy beside the extension number.
Iteration 2: shared 190% size and 102% shift; improved triangle balance and baseline integration, but the minor mark still benefited from independent optical treatment.
Iteration 3 selected: major 192%/103% and minor 188%/106%; the major width is about 7.39px and the minor width about 6.09px at 390px.
The final triangle remains substantially narrower than the previous 11.84px generic character and the final minor mark remains shorter than the previous 8.88px mathematical minus.
No source song data, alphaTex generation, dependencies, or global theme rules changed.
